name: @radzor/webhook-receiver
description: Secure webhook receiver with HMAC signature verification, replay protection, and event routing. Validates payloads from Stripe, GitHub, Shopify, and custom sources.

inputs.name: secret
inputs.description: Shared secret for HMAC signature verification.

inputs.name: tolerance
inputs.description: Maximum age in seconds for replay protection (0 to disable).

inputs.name: timestampHeader
inputs.description: HTTP header containing the event timestamp.

outputs.name: verifiedPayload
outputs.description: Parsed and verified webhook payload with event type and data.

events.name: onVerified
events.description: Fired when a webhook is verified.

events.name: onRejected
events.description: Fired when a webhook fails verification.

actions.name: verify
actions.description: Verify a webhook signature and parse the payload.

actions.name: verifyStripe
actions.description: Verify a Stripe webhook using their specific signing scheme.

llm.constraints: Must receive raw request body (not parsed JSON). Configure your framework to preserve the raw body for signature verification.
